title: BespokeCalculationTime
description: A class to specify additional Calculation Time terms for the purposes of Initial Margin.

asCalculationAgent.description: If set to True, the Calculation Time for Initial Margin is the time as of which the Calculation Agent (IM) computes its end of day valuations of derivatives transactions.

bespokeCalculationTimeTerms.description: Additional Terms applicable to Calculation Time for Initial Margin.
